name: Chocolate French Toast with Strawberry Syrup
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups fresh or unsweetened frozen strawberries
6 slices French bread (sliced on bias 1/2-inch thick)
recipeInstructions:
1. Make strawberry syrup: In a small saucepan, combine the corn syrup, sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, and strawberries. Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring often. Lower the heat to simmering and cook until the mixture thickens and reaches a syrupy consistency. Keep warm.
2. Make chocolate French Toast: In a large shallow bowl, whisk together the eggs. In a small bowl, combine the vanilla sugar and cocoa powder until well blended. Whisk this into the eggs. Add the milk and mix thoroughly.
3. Heat half of the vegetable oil in a nonstick sauté pan over medium heat. Dip each bread slice in the egg mixture until fully coated. Carefully transfer the bread slices to the pan, cooking them until golden brown on both sides (about 2-3 minutes per side), turning once.
4. Transfer the cooked bread to a warmed plate. Repeat with the remaining bread slices.
5. To serve, drizzle with strawberry syrup, top with a dollop of whipped cream, and sprinkle with confectioners' sugar.
Yield: 2 servings
